What real-world problem are you solving?: Students struggle to retain information from long study sessions
How does your solution use AI?: We use AI to generate personalized flashcards and quizzes based on study material

What real-world problem are you solving?: People forget to take medications and track health metrics
Who is this problem for?: Patients with chronic conditions and caregivers
How does your solution use AI?: AI predicts optimal medication times and generates health insights
Demo Link: Reminds users and provides personalized health recommendations
Biggest Challenge: Integrates with wearables to provide AI-powered health analytics
